title: Package Archive Creation Flow
entry_point: ArchiveManager::archive(CompletePackageInterface $package, string $format, string $targetDir, ?string $fileName = null, bool $ignoreFilters = false): string
activity_flow: [VALIDATE] format empty? → throw InvalidArgumentException('Format must be specified')
[DECISION] usableArchiver found? → No: throw RuntimeException('No archiver found to support %s format')
→ getArchiveName() or sanitize getName() via Preg::replace → 'base'
→ distReference is 40-char hex? → add dist_reference + dist_type
[DECISION] overwriteFiles=false AND file_exists($target)? → YES: return $target (early exit)

key_methods.archive: public archive(CompletePackageInterface $package, string $format, string $targetDir, ?string $fileName = null, bool $ignoreFilters = false): string
key_methods.buildExcludePatterns: private buildExcludePatterns(array $parts, array $formats): string[] — generates patterns like 'name-*.zip'

key_decisions: no matching archiver found → throw exception
RootPackage vs regular package → skip download step for root
composer.json present in downloaded source → override archive name/excludes
fileName provided vs null → custom name vs auto-generated
overwriteFiles=false && file already exists → return early without re-archiving
distReference is 40-char hex → use dist_reference+dist_type instead of version
key_relationships: ArchiveManager depends_on DownloadManager (download + install package sources)
ArchiveManager depends_on Filesystem (dir creation, rename, remove)

ArchiveManager reads CompletePackageInterface (getName, getArchiveName, getDistReference, getDistType, getPrettyVersion, getSourceReference, getSourceType, getArchiveExcludes, setArchiveName, setArchiveExcludes)
important_notes: Temp source directory is always cleaned up for non-root packages (finally-style via catch+rethrow). Temp archive file ($tempTarget) is also cleaned after rename to $target. Archive name/excludes can be overridden by the package's own composer.json after download. Supported formats are hard-coded by archiver class type (not from ArchiverInterface).
